publishedAbstract: An OSD pod remains in CrashLoopBackOff or Pending state. The logs from the init container expand-encrypted-bluefs or encryption-open show the following error: * Can not resize LUKS2 device with static size. * Underlying device for crypt device pvc-name-block-dmcrypt disappeared. * Command failed with code-1 (wrong or missing parameters).
publishedTitle: ODF OSD failing to start with error: Underlying device for crypt device disappeared
